_comment: Owner-maintained list of individual first-party AMG card images for cards NOT in the fold-sheet PnP PDFs (scraper/amgNormalise.ts AMG_SOURCES). AMG publishes the NEWEST units as per-card PNG/webp images on their transmission pages before folding them into the next DOC51 faction PDF. `npm run amg:extras` downloads each, converts to webp, stages it under scraper/amg-cards/<category>/extra/, and merges it into scraper/amg-card-map.json (sourcePdf = `source`). For unit cards, AMG's _Front = the stats/play side (-> <slug>.webp) and _Back = the art side (-> <slug>-front.webp), which is the reverse of our internal `side` naming (front = art). Add new releases here; re-runnable.

sources.note: Imperial High Command squad pack (released 2026-04). https://www.atomicmassgames.com/transmission/imperial-high-command/ — Tarkin, Thrawn, Tagge (Krennic already in DOC51_GalacticEmpire_Units; his duplicate is intentionally omitted).
Imperial Probe Droid (Scene to Stats, product SWQ98). https://www.atomicmassgames.com/transmission/scene-to-stats-imperial-probe-droid/

Customizable Imperial Officer & Agent (product SWQ09). https://www.atomicmassgames.com/transmission/customizable-imperial-officer-agent/ — Commands are clean per-card images (CommandCard_1 = Inexorable Advance / Officer, CommandCard_2 = Fearsome Oration / Agent). The UNIT cards are published only as a `*_Fan.png` at FULL res = the play side + art side laid SIDE BY SIDE (2088x760 = two 1040x760 cards), so each is cropped out via `crop` (left 0-1040 = play, right 1048-2088 = art). The default card title (Ruthless Efficiency / Bringing Order to the Galaxy) matches the catalogue slug.
